info.name: Denon MC3000
info.author: dtavan, BeMixxx
info.description: Optimized for Denon MC3000 - Default Midi Channel. Updated for full 4-deck support (A/B/C/D) and current Mixxx effects/beatloop controls.

option.label: Jog wheel sensitivity
option.description: Sensitivity factor for pitch-bend when turning the jog wheel without touch-scratching (i.e. whenever VINYL MODE is off, or the wheel isn't currently touched). Higher values reduce sensitivity.

option.label: Scratch sensitivity
option.description: Sensitivity factor while actively touch-scratching with VINYL MODE on. Higher values reduce sensitivity.

option.label: VINYL MODE on by default
option.description: Whether VINYL MODE is enabled by default at startup, for all four decks.

control.description: EFX.4 = FX focus button (deck C side=left=Unit1)
EFX.4 = FX focus button (deck C side=left=Unit1)
TRACK SELECT KNOB SW (push): load the highlighted track into the first stopped deck
EFX.4 = FX focus button (deck D side=right=Unit2)
EFX.4 = FX focus button (deck D side=right=Unit2)
EFX.4 knob = FX dry/wet mix (left, Unit1)
EFX.4 knob = FX dry/wet mix (deck C side=left=Unit1)
EFX.4 knob = FX dry/wet mix (right, Unit2)
EFX.4 knob = FX dry/wet mix (deck D side=right=Unit2)
LOAD A (fixed channel; targets deck A, or deck C with SHIFT held)
LOAD B (fixed channel; targets deck B, or deck D with SHIFT held)
